17.reason: [The program uses the deprecated and unsafe function 'gets', which has been removed from newer C standards (C11 onwards). This causes a compilation error on systems where 'gets' is not available. Additionally, the code does not implement graph traversal (DFS/BFS), vertex deletion, or any logic related to the problem description鈥攊t merely reads and prints input lines. The entire implementation is unrelated to the required functionality, leading to both compilation issues (due to 'gets') and logical failure.]
